title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 324.1148 - Violations, penalty
text:
324.1148.  Violations, penalty. — Any person who violates sections 324.1100 to 324.1148 is guilty of a class A misdemeanor.  Any second or subsequent violation of sections 324.1100 to 324.1148 is a class E felony.
(L. 2007 H.B. 780 merged with S.B. 308, A.L. 2014 S.B. 491) 
Effective 1-01-17
